---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Something isn't working as expected
title: '[Bug] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Observe '...'

## Expected Behavior

A clear description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened instead.

## Environment

- **Browser:** (e.g. Chrome 126, Firefox 130, Safari 18)
- **OS:** (e.g. Windows 11, macOS 15, Ubuntu 24.04)
- **Connection:** (e.g. WiFi, Ethernet, Mobile 4G/5G)
- **Edge Node:** (shown in the dashboard header, e.g. "Mumbai (BOM)")

## Diagnostic Report

If applicable, export a TXT or JSON report from the dashboard and paste the summary section here.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.
